title: Consume a wrapper with IntoIterator
scenario: When callers are done with a wrapper, IntoIterator should let them move owned values out naturally.
instructions: Implement IntoIterator for OrderLines, yielding owned OrderLine values.

hints.body: Keep the Exposing iteration on collection wrappers code active and implement IntoIterator for OrderLines, yielding owned OrderLine values.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Consume a wrapper with IntoIterator is shown below.

completionExplanation: Consume a wrapper with IntoIterator now extends the active Exposing iteration on collection wrappers code with wrap into iterator. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
